taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: React, TypeScript, Next.js, API development, Backend services
skill_match_scores: React:1.0, TypeScript:1.0, Next.js:1.0, API development:1.0, Backend services:1.0
must_have_quals: 4+ years of experience as a software engineer building user-facing products, Strong across the stack: modern frontend (React, TypeScript, Next.js) and backend (APIs, databases, services), Built products for developers or technical users, Understand the expectations of this audience and hold yourself to the same bar, Think in systems, Naturally build reusable abstractions, composable components, and clean APIs rather than one-off solutions, Comfortable with ambiguity, Can take a rough problem statement and turn it into shipped code, Use AI tools in your own development workflow and have opinions on how they should work, Ship fast without sacrificing quality
preferred_quals: Experience working on platform or horizontal teams where you built shared infrastructure that other teams depended on, Contributions to open source projects, especially in the React or Next.js ecosystem
core_responsibilities: Build and own core Dashboard infrastructure: the shell, navigation, layout system, and shared components that every product area builds within, Architect and implement the backend services and APIs that power the Dashboard, including personalization, notifications, and agent-powered experiences, Drive performance as a core feature. Profile, measure, and optimize aggressively. Every interaction should feel instant, Build agent-facing surfaces: the UI and API layers where agents surface errors, suggest fixes, update config, and keep users on best practices, Work closely with product area teams (Billing, CI/CD, Observability, etc.) to ensure their pages integrate cleanly into the Dashboard shell and follow shared patterns, Ship incrementally and continuously. This is a living product that improves every week
job_summary: Vercel is a company that provides tools and cloud infrastructure for developers to build a faster, more personalized web. They are seeking a Full Stack Engineer to build and own the Vercel Dashboard, which serves as the control plane for every Vercel user, focusing on performance, personalization, and integration with various product areas.
